MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RANDY SWAYNE AND DANITA SWAYNE's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to written stipulation" is granted.

Order signed/Judgment signed.
